title: On Free Time and Productivity
summary: I have self-banned myself from the Orange Website . content:
I have self-banned myself from the Orange Website. There are many reasons, but the main ones are that I was spending too much time reading that website and there is way too much toxicity and a culture of bigoted neoliberal techbro NIMBYism.

As such, I have found myself with lots of free time on my hands and less of an urge to write something that will give me more karma on the Orange Website and instead an urge to write something that is more satisfying to put out into the world. That brings me to one new thing I am going to be doing: weekly posts. Someone here hold me to that. I'll release one post every Sunday, starting with this one. Topics will be anything and everything as long as I find it interesting.

Now to get my content, I have moved over to lobsters. Much more intellectually stimulating articles as well as a much lower rate of content.

With this free time, I will also be productive by taking up a few new projects: getting my radio license (finally) and getting up a blade server system I found at my university's surplus store. I should have my license by the end of the week, and the server installed and running with OpenStack the week after that. I'll let y'all know how it goes in the coming weeks.

I've also gotten back into playing some video games, which is something I haven't done in a while. I've decided to stream playing Factorio on Twitch. I'll switch to Owncast once I have more computing power. Until then, I'll have to stick with Twitch.

Hold me accountable (email me).
